ROK GLOSSARY — PLAIN ENGLISH

What all these terms actually mean
ROK Score (0-100)
How confident ROK is in a signal. 80+ = very strong. 60+ = good. Below 60 = use caution.
Stop Loss
The price where you should sell if the trade goes wrong. Like a seatbelt — it limits how much you can lose.
Price Target
Wall Street analysts' best guess for where a stock is headed. Not a guarantee, but useful as a goal.
Risk/Reward (R:R)
Compares potential loss to potential gain. 1:2 means risking $1 to make $2. Higher is better.
RSI (Momentum)
Measures if a stock is being bought or sold too aggressively. Above 70 = maybe too hot. Below 30 = possibly cheap.
Volume Spike
Today's trading volume vs the 30-day average. 2x+ means unusual interest — hedge funds or institutions are moving.
Congressional Buy
A US senator or representative disclosed buying this stock with their own money. Required by law within 45 days.
Insider Buy (Form 4)
A company executive bought their own company's stock. Insiders only buy with personal money when they expect it to go up.
Unusual Options
A large fund placed a big bet that this stock moves significantly. These trades often cost $1M+.
Short Squeeze
When lots of traders bet a stock falls, but it goes up instead, forcing them to all buy at once — causing a rapid price spike.
Fear & Greed Index
CNN measures overall market emotion. High fear (under 30) often means stocks are cheap. High greed (over 70) = be careful.
Put/Call Ratio
Measures how many bets hedge funds are making on stocks going down vs up. Below 0.8 = bullish. Above 1.2 = bearish.

LIVE SECTOR MONEY FLOW

Where is money flowing today? LIVE
Sector rotation = large funds move money between industries. Green tiles = money flowing in. Red tiles = money flowing out. Trade with the flow, not against it.
Tap the INTEL tab to load live sector data…

LIVE RSI EXTREMES SCANNER

Oversold bounce plays & overbought stocks to avoid LIVE
RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures if a stock is being over-bought or over-sold. Below 35 = oversold (may bounce up). Above 72 = overbought (may pull back). Use with other signals for best results.
Tap the INTEL tab to scan RSI extremes…

HIDDEN GEMS SCANNER

ROK buy signals with strong fundamentals but low hype LIVE
Hidden Gems = ROK buy signals that have solid fundamentals (low P/E, high signal strength) but aren't getting media attention. These are often the best long-term opportunities.
Tap the INTEL tab to scan for hidden gems…

HOW TO READ THIS
BUY MORE = ROK likes this stock, price dipped, good time to add shares
SELL NOW = ROK thinks this stock will drop, get out to protect your money
TAKE PROFITS = Stock near its target, could sell some and keep gains

Add ROK to your Home Screen One tap to open. Works offline. Free — no App Store needed.
WHAT IS ROK?
ROK is your personal stock advisor.

It watches the stock market 24/7 so you don't have to. Every 15 minutes it tells you:

What to BUY — stocks likely to go up
What to SELL — stocks likely to go down
What to WATCH — stocks about to move
HOW DOES ROK KNOW?
ROK has insider-level intelligence:

Senators & Congress members must disclose their stock trades by law — ROK tracks them

When a CEO buys their own company's stock with personal money — ROK flags it

When hedge funds make $1M+ bets on a stock — ROK catches it

Reddit, news, and social media signals analyzed in real time
HOW TO USE ROK
3 steps to start making smarter trades:
1⃣Tap SIGNALS to see today's picks
2⃣Tap BOUGHT IT on any stock you buy
3⃣Check MY STOCKS daily — ROK tells you when to sell
STAY SAFE
The #1 rule: never lose more than you're OK losing.

Only invest what you can afford to lose — not rent money, not emergency funds

5–10% per stock — if you have $1,000, put $50–$100 max in any one pick

Stop-loss = your safety net — ROK sets one for every signal. It limits losses automatically

Set price alerts so ROK wakes you up when a stock needs action
